title: Memo Auto-Title (<1s)
objective: Generate specific memo titles that are useful in list view and search.

inputExample.transcript: Need to rewrite the launch page hero. Put proof first, then product shot, then pricing line. Also ask Nina for two customer quotes by Tuesday.

prompt.task: Create one concise and specific title for a fresh memo.
prompt.system:
You write titles for Talkie voice memos.
Rules:
- Return JSON only.
- Title must be <= 48 characters.
- Make it specific to the memo's core action.
- Never output generic titles like "Voice Memo" or "Thoughts".

example.title: Launch hero: proof first, quotes by Tuesday
example.rationale: Memo focuses on landing page reorder and quote deadline.

testCase.name: Avoid generic titles on clear action memo

input.transcript: Book dentist for Friday and email insurance form before noon.

title: Memo Type Detection
objective: Classify memo intent early so the right local workflow can run automatically.

inputExample.transcript: Need to lock April hiring plan: two backend roles, one designer, no contractor spend until Q3.

prompt.task: Classify memo into one primary type and optional secondary type.
prompt.system:
You are a routing classifier for Talkie.
Return JSON only.
Pick one primaryType from candidateTypes.
If confidence is below 0.65, set needsReview to true.

testCase.name: Ambiguous personal reflection should not over-route

input.transcript: Felt scattered today. Might restructure mornings and maybe skip Slack until 10.

assertions: needsReview can be true when uncertainty is high

title: Action Item Extraction With Confidence
objective: Extract trackable tasks from natural speech while preserving evidence spans.

inputExample.transcript: By Monday, send revised onboarding doc to Priya. Also schedule 30 minutes with legal next week. I should probably clean up old Stripe test accounts too.

prompt.task: Extract explicit and implied action items from memo transcript.
prompt.system:
You extract tasks from speech.
Return JSON only.
Each item needs: text, owner, dueDateISO (or null), confidence, evidence.
Do not invent due dates if none are present.

items.text: Send revised onboarding doc to Priya
items.evidence: By Monday, send revised onboarding doc to Priya.
schedule 30 minutes with legal next week

testCase.name: Low-confidence tasks remain extractable but marked

input.transcript: Maybe clean up the old docs folder sometime.

title: Transcript Cleanup Presets
objective: Apply local rewrite modes without losing factual meaning from the source transcript.

inputExample.transcript: Um okay so the thing is we shipped the sync fix and uh support tickets dropped from nineteen to six, but we still have weird duplicate reminders for recurring tasks.

prompt.task: Rewrite transcript according to preset while preserving concrete facts.
prompt.system:
You rewrite transcripts using style presets.
Return JSON only.
Never change numbers, names, or dates.
If preset is executive-summary, use short declarative sentences.

example.cleanedText: Shipped sync fix reduced support tickets from 19 to 6. Duplicate reminders still occur for recurring tasks.

testCase.name: Fact preservation under rewrite

input.transcript: We spent 4 hours on export bugs and fixed 3 of 5 issues.

title: Top-3 What Matters Summary
objective: Compress long voice notes into the three highest-signal points.

inputExample.transcript: Long ramble about launch prep, hiring plan, and a possible referral program. Final decisions: launch moved to May 10, defer referral until after analytics rewrite, and cut onboarding to three screens.

prompt.task: Return exactly three highest-priority points from transcript.
prompt.system:
You produce high-signal summaries.
Return JSON only.
Output exactly 3 points.
Each point must include evidence quote and priority score 1-100.

topPoints.point: Referral program deferred until analytics rewrite is done.
topPoints.evidence: defer referral until after analytics rewrite

topPoints.point: Onboarding flow reduced to three screens.

testCase.name: Summary must stay at exactly three points

input.transcript: Decision one. Decision two. Decision three. Decision four.

title: Calendar Intent Detection
objective: Detect event-worthy language and produce structured event suggestions.

inputExample.transcript: Lunch with Dana next Tuesday at 1 at Canary. Also review roadmap with ops Thursday 4:30 PM for 45 minutes.

prompt.task: Extract potential calendar events from transcript.
prompt.system:
You detect calendar intents.
Return JSON only.
Resolve relative dates using capturedAt and timezone.
Mark needsConfirmation true when date/time confidence is below 0.8.

testCase.name: Relative date resolution uses explicit timezone

title: Reminder Phrasing Normalization
objective: Turn vague spoken reminders into clear and actionable reminder objects.

inputExample.transcript: Need to maybe ping Chris about the invoice thing before it gets weird.

prompt.task: Normalize vague reminder speech into specific reminder text and metadata.
prompt.system:
You normalize reminders.
Return JSON only.
Reminder text should start with a strong verb.
When due date is unclear, set dueDateISO to null and add followUpQuestion.

example.reminderText: Message Chris for invoice status update
example.followUpQuestion: When do you want this done?

testCase.name: Reminder text should be imperative and concrete

input.transcript: Maybe look into new card design at some point.

assertions: followUpQuestion exists when due date is missing

title: Private Redaction Pass
objective: Redact sensitive data locally before sharing, syncing, or cloud routing.

inputExample.transcript: Card ending 4821 failed again. Patient name is Mark Lavoie and policy number is HN-772-19.

prompt.task: Detect and mask sensitive entities while preserving memo readability.
prompt.system:
You redact sensitive entities.
Return JSON only.
Use [REDACTED_TYPE] placeholders.
Include list of redacted entities with type and confidence.

example.redactedTranscript: Card ending [REDACTED_FINANCIAL] failed again. Patient name is [REDACTED_PERSON] and policy number is [REDACTED_HEALTH_ID].

testCase.name: No raw sensitive tokens remain in output

input.transcript: SSN 555-44-9012 and account 00391299 should never leave device.

title: Per-User Writing Style Memory
objective: Rewrite outputs in the user's preferred voice using local style profile memory.

inputExample.transcript: We need to change onboarding and probably reduce friction around account linking.

prompt.task: Rewrite summary using stored user style profile.
prompt.system:
You are a personal style adapter.
Return JSON only.
Match styleProfile preferences.
Do not alter factual meaning.

example.styledSummary:
Onboarding needs two changes:
- Remove extra account-linking step
- Reduce friction in first-run flow

testCase.name: Avoid banned style words

input.transcript: We should utilize a new onboarding flow.

title: Find Similar Memo (Semantic Recall)
objective: Retrieve related historical memos to improve continuity in decision-making.

inputExample.queryTranscript: Need to revisit referral program constraints before launch.

candidateMemos.summary: Deferred referral system until analytics migration.
Updated website hero copy and social proof blocks.
Defined invite-only referral pilot for power users.

prompt.task: Rank the most semantically related memos for current transcript.
prompt.system:
You are a memo recall ranker.
Return JSON only.
Select top 3 matches with relevance score and rationale.
Prioritize decision continuity over keyword overlap.

testCase.name: Historical decision memo should rank above lexical overlap

input.queryTranscript: Need to revisit cancellation policy and trials.

candidateMemos.summary: Discussed trial cancellation policy and refund rules.

title: Project Clustering From Voice History
objective: Auto-group memos into evolving project threads without manual folders.

memos.summary: Refactor sync retry logic and duplicate reminders.
Landing page social proof order and CTA copy.
Recurring reminder bug root cause in scheduler.
Launch announcement draft and waitlist email.

prompt.task: Cluster memo summaries into project-level threads.
prompt.system:
You cluster memos into project threads.
Return JSON only.
Each cluster must have: clusterId, title, memoIds, confidence.
Create "misc" only when confidence is below 0.6.

testCase.name: Related bug memos should cluster together

memos.summary: Crash in sync queue on reconnect.
Retry strategy for sync queue and reconnect handling.

assertions: a1 and a2 share a clusterId
b1 may be separate or misc

title: Next-Step Suggestion Engine
objective: Recommend the best immediate action after transcription to reduce decision fatigue.

inputExample.transcript: I have three product ideas but no clear winner. Need a quick way to score them this week.

prompt.task: Choose one best next action for the user right now.
prompt.system:
You are a next-step recommender.
Return JSON only.
Pick exactly one action from availableActions.
Prefer actions that unblock momentum within 5 minutes.

example.reason: User has options but no decision criteria; one clarifying question unlocks scoring.

testCase.name: Action choice reflects transcript uncertainty

input.transcript: Tomorrow 9 AM send invoice to Alex and set follow-up reminder for Friday.

title: Follow-Up Question Generator
objective: Ask minimal clarifying questions when memo intent is ambiguous.

inputExample.transcript: Need to get the partner thing moving again soon.

prompt.task: Generate up to two high-value clarifying questions.
prompt.system:
You generate clarifying questions.
Return JSON only.
At most maxQuestions questions.
Questions must be answerable in one sentence.

questions: Which partner are you referring to?
What is the first concrete step you want to take this week?

testCase.name: Do not exceed requested question count

title: Hybrid Local/Cloud Router
objective: Route requests to local first, escalating only when complexity requires cloud.

prompt.task: Decide whether to run local or cloud for this request.
prompt.system:
You are a model router.
Return JSON only.
Prefer local when quality risk is acceptable.
If privacyLevel is high, local wins unless impossible.

example.reason: Short summary task with high privacy requirement.

testCase.name: Long-context tasks escalate to cloud

title: Context Packet Builder
objective: Package just enough memory context for downstream steps without token bloat.

inputExample.transcript: Need to finalize waitlist flow and launch email sequence this week.

relatedMemos.summary: Waitlist conversion dropped after form change.

prompt.task: Build compact context packet for next LLM call.
prompt.system:
You build context packets.
Return JSON only.
Honor tokenBudget.
Prioritize decisions, active tasks, and unresolved questions.

openQuestions: Did form change cause drop in conversion?

testCase.name: Context packet must stay under budget

input.transcript: Need to plan hiring and launch and docs and support and pricing and analytics.

assertions: packet has at least one decision or openQuestion field

title: Conversation To Checklist Transformer
objective: Convert stream-of-consciousness transcripts into ordered execution checklists.

inputExample.transcript: For launch day: first QA the checkout flow, then schedule tweets, then send to press list after site is live.

prompt.task: Transform transcript into ordered checklist with dependencies.
prompt.system:
You convert speech to checklist.
Return JSON only.
Each item needs: id, text, order, dependsOn, owner.
Preserve execution order from transcript when explicit.

testCase.name: Dependency order matches explicit sequencing words

input.transcript: First export data. Then verify CSV. Finally email finance.

assertions: item 3 depends on item 2 or item 1

title: Personal Knowledge Graph From Voice
objective: Build a local graph of people, projects, decisions, and open questions over time.

memos.transcript: Dana owns launch email copy. We decided to postpone referral pilot to May.
Question still open: should we gate referral by invite code?

prompt.task: Extract graph nodes and edges from memo batch.
prompt.system:
You construct a personal knowledge graph.
Return JSON only.
Nodes can be person, project, decision, question, artifact.
Edges need type, sourceNodeId, targetNodeId, evidenceMemoId.

testCase.name: Duplicate entity names should be merged
assertions: edges reference merged Chris node id

title: Catch Me Up Daily Brief
objective: Produce a private daily narrative from memos, tasks, and decisions.

memos.summary: Need legal review on revised terms.

prompt.task: Generate concise daily brief with wins, risks, and next actions.
prompt.system:
You write daily briefs.
Return JSON only.
Sections required: wins, risks, nextActions.
Keep each section under 3 bullets.

risks: Legal review still pending for terms update.
nextActions: Book legal review slot by Monday.

testCase.name: Daily brief includes all required sections

title: Contradiction And Drift Detection
objective: Detect conflicts between new memos and prior decisions.

newMemo.transcript: Let us launch on April 28 instead of May 10.

priorDecisions.text: Launch date is May 10, approved in planning meeting.

prompt.task: Flag contradictions or strategic drift against known decisions.
prompt.system:
You detect contradictions.
Return JSON only.
For each conflict include severity, conflictingDecisionId, and explanation.
No conflict should be returned as empty array.

conflicts.explanation: New memo proposes April 28 while approved date is May 10.
conflicts.recommendation: Request explicit decision override before updating timeline.

testCase.name: Date conflict should be high severity

newMemo.transcript: Move quarterly review from June 20 to June 2.

priorDecisions.text: Quarterly review date fixed to June 20.

title: Momentum Scoring
objective: Quantify execution momentum from spoken intents versus completed outcomes.

prompt.task: Compute momentum score and explain key drivers.
prompt.system:
You score execution momentum.
Return JSON only.
Score is 0-100.
Penalize repeated unresolved intents.
Reward completed intents within period.

drivers: Legal review intent remains unresolved with 3 repeats.

testCase.name: Score drops when repeats rise without completion

title: Local Agent Loop For Memo Processing
objective: Run a deterministic local chain: classify, extract, summarize, route, verify.

inputExample.transcript: Need to reschedule partner demo to Wednesday and send revised deck tonight.

prompt.task: Produce outputs for each pipeline step and final state.
prompt.system:
You orchestrate a local memo pipeline.
Return JSON only.
Emit per-step outputs and final status.
If verify fails, finalStatus must be "needs-review".

testCase.name: Failed verify step blocks auto-execution

input.transcript: Maybe move something around at some point.

assertions: verify.passed can be false for vague memo

title: Meeting Mode Live Rolling Structure
objective: Maintain a live structured view of agenda, decisions, questions, and actions while speaking.

inputExample.chunkText: Decision: cut scope to onboarding and billing. Open question: who owns docs migration?

prompt.task: Update meeting state from new transcript chunk.
prompt.system:
You maintain rolling meeting structure.
Return JSON only.
Update state incrementally.
Do not duplicate existing items.
Tag new items with chunkIndex.

decisions.text: Cut scope to onboarding and billing

testCase.name: Repeated decision text should not duplicate

input.chunkText: Decision: keep beta closed for now.

title: Intent Trend Alerts
objective: Detect recurring spoken intents that are not converting into completed work.

prompt.task: Generate alerts for unresolved repeated intents.
prompt.system:
You detect intent trends.
Return JSON only.
Alert when mentionCount meets threshold and completionCount is low.
Include one suggested intervention per alert.

alerts.reason: Mentioned 7 times with 0 completions in 30 days.
alerts.suggestedIntervention: Schedule 45-minute focused block and define done criteria.

testCase.name: Threshold logic gates alert emission

title: Voice-Based Operating Layer
objective: Translate natural speech into structured executable commands with safety gates.

inputExample.utterance: Open the latest launch notes, append today's blockers, and share with Dana in Slack.

prompt.task: Convert spoken instruction into structured command plan.
prompt.system:
You convert voice commands to structured actions.
Return JSON only.
Use steps with app, action, args.
Mark requiresConfirmation true for risky operations.

testCase.name: Dangerous file actions require explicit confirmation

input.utterance: Delete the old exports folder and empty trash.

assertions: at least one step action is marked destructive
